dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4362 IS: Railroad Retirement Fairness Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Coons (for himself and Mr. Hawley) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974 to eliminate certain deductions for annuities under the Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Railroad Retirement Fairness Act of 2026.

section.header: Eliminating certain deductions for annuities under the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974
section.text: Section 2(f) of the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974 (45 U.S.C. 231a(f)) is amended by striking subdivision (6).
